title: Psalm 103:1
message: Bless the LORD, O my soul; And all that is within me, bless His holy name!
notes: True worship begins within. Every part of my being is invited to honor the Lord. I choose to bless His holy name with my whole heart.

title: Psalm 103:2
message: Bless the LORD, O my soul, And forget not all His benefits:
notes: Gratitude fuels worship. As I remember His goodness, my heart naturally overflows with praise.

title: Psalm 34:1
message: I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
notes: Praise is not reserved for good days alone. I choose to honor God continually because He is always worthy.

title: Psalm 145:1
message: I will extol You, my God, O King; And I will bless Your name forever and ever.
notes: The King deserves eternal praise. Worship is my lifelong response to His greatness.

title: Psalm 145:2
message: Every day I will bless You, And I will praise Your name forever and ever.
notes: Praise is meant to become a daily rhythm. Every new day is another opportunity to glorify God.

title: Psalm 95:1-2
message: Oh come, let us sing to the LORD! Let us shout joyfully to the Rock of our salvation. Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving; Let us shout joyfully to Him with psalms.
notes: Joy, thanksgiving, and celebration belong in God's presence. Worship is a joyful response to our Savior.

title: Psalm 96:1-2
message: Oh, sing to the LORD a new song! Sing to the LORD, all the earth. Sing to the LORD, bless His name; Proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day.
notes: Every season deserves fresh worship. God's salvation is worthy of continual proclamation.

title: Psalm 100:1-2
message: Make a joyful shout to the LORD, all you lands! Serve the LORD with gladness; Come before His presence with singing.
notes: Joy and gladness are fitting responses when approaching God's presence.

title: Psalm 100:4
message: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, And into His courts with praise. Be thankful to Him, and bless His name.
notes: Thanksgiving opens my heart to God's presence. Gratitude prepares me for deeper worship.

title: Psalm 150:1-2
message: Praise the LORD! Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in His mighty firmament! Praise Him for His mighty acts; Praise Him according to His excellent greatness!
notes: God deserves praise because of both what He has done and who He is.

title: Psalm 150:6
message: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD. Praise the LORD!
notes: Every breath is an opportunity to glorify God. My life itself is an instrument of praise.

title: Psalm 29:2
message: Give unto the LORD the glory due to His name; Worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.
notes: God alone deserves all glory. Worship is the proper response to His holiness.

title: Psalm 66:4
message: All the earth shall worship You And sing praises to You; They shall sing praises to Your name.
notes: One day all creation will acknowledge God's greatness. I gladly join that eternal chorus today.

title: Psalm 63:3-4
message: Because Your lovingkindness is better than life, My lips shall praise You. Thus I will bless You while I live; I will lift up my hands in Your name.
notes: God's steadfast love is worth more than life itself. My response is continual praise and surrender.

title: Psalm 86:12
message: I will praise You, O Lord my God, with all my heart, And I will glorify Your name forevermore.
notes: Wholehearted worship reflects a heart fully devoted to God.

title: Psalm 111:1
message: Praise the LORD! I will praise the LORD with my whole heart, In the assembly of the upright and in the congregation.
notes: God is worthy of both private devotion and public worship.

title: Psalm 113:1-3
message: Praise, O servants of the LORD, Praise the name of the LORD! Blessed be the name of the LORD From this time forth and forevermore! From the rising of the sun to its going down The LORD'S name is to be praised.
notes: The Lord's name deserves uninterrupted praise throughout every moment of every day.

title: Psalm 146:1-2
message: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD, O my soul! While I live I will praise the LORD; I will sing praises to my God while I have my being.
notes: Praise is my lifelong purpose. As long as I have breath, I will worship God.

title: Psalm 147:1
message: Praise the LORD! For it is good to sing praises to our God; For it is pleasant, and praise is beautiful.
notes: Worship is beautiful because it rightly exalts the One who is worthy.

title: Hebrews 13:15
message: Therefore by Him let us continually offer the sacrifice of praise to God, that is, the fruit of our lips, giving thanks to His name.
notes: Praise is a continual offering. Even in difficulty, thanksgiving glorifies God.

title: Ephesians 5:19-20
message: Speaking to one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord, giving thanks always for all things to God the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
notes: A worship-filled life is marked by gratitude, joyful songs, and hearts devoted to Christ.

title: Colossians 3:16
message: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly in all wisdom, teaching and admonishing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts to the Lord.
notes: The Word of God produces heartfelt worship that overflows in songs of grace.

title: 1 Chronicles 16:23-25
message: Sing to the LORD, all the earth; Proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day. Declare His glory among the nations, His wonders among all peoples. For the LORD is great and greatly to be praised; He is also to be feared above all gods.
notes: God's greatness compels both worship and witness. His glory is meant to be proclaimed everywhere.

title: 1 Chronicles 16:29
message: Give to the LORD the glory due His name; Bring an offering, and come before Him. Oh, worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness!
notes: True worship honors God's holiness and gladly gives Him the glory He deserves.

title: Isaiah 25:1
message: O LORD, You are my God. I will exalt You, I will praise Your name, For You have done wonderful things; Your counsels of old are faithfulness and truth.
notes: God's faithfulness throughout history gives me endless reasons to praise Him today.

title: Isaiah 12:4-5
message: Praise the LORD, call upon His name; Declare His deeds among the peoples, Make mention that His name is exalted. Sing to the LORD, For He has done excellent things; This is known in all the earth.
notes: Worship naturally leads to testimony. God's excellent works deserve worldwide recognition.

title: John 4:23-24
message: But the hour is coming, and now is, when the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and truth; for the Father is seeking such to worship Him. God is Spirit, and those who worship Him must worship in spirit and truth.
notes: The Father desires authentic worship flowing from a sincere heart aligned with His truth.

title: Revelation 4:11
message: You are worthy, O Lord, To receive glory and honor and power; For You created all things, And by Your will they exist and were created.
notes: God's worthiness is rooted in His role as Creator and Sustainer of everything that exists.

title: Revelation 5:12
message: Worthy is the Lamb who was slain To receive power and riches and wisdom, And strength and honor and glory and blessing!
notes: Jesus, the Lamb of God, deserves every expression of honor because of His redeeming sacrifice.

title: Philippians 2:9-11
message: Therefore God also has highly exalted Him and given Him the name which is above every name, that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow... and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
notes: Jesus has been exalted above every name. Worshiping Him aligns me with the eternal confession of heaven and earth.
